WHERE = x (from image), WHEN = subdivision (model).\nconst EXERCISES = [\n  { id:\"p5\", name:\"Page 5 \u00b7 Ex 1 \u2014 sixteenths\", img:P5_IMG, noteY:0.388, beats:[\n    {sub:4, notes:[{x:0.2154,h:\"R\"},{x:0.2602,h:\"L\"},{x:0.3089,h:\"R\"},{x:0.3537,h:\"L\"}]},\n    {sub:4, notes:[{x:0.4146,h:\"R\"},{x:0.4593,h:\"L\"},{x:0.5081,h:\"R\"},{x:0.5528,h:\"L\"}]},\n    {sub:4, notes:[{x:0.6179,h:\"R\"},{x:0.6626,h:\"L\"},{x:0.7114,h:\"R\"},{x:0.7561,h:\"L\"}]},\n    {sub:4, notes:[{x:0.8211,h:\"R\"},{x:0.8659,h:\"L\"},{x:0.9146,h:\"R\"},{x:0.9593,h:\"L\"}]},\n  ]},\n  { id:\"tr\", name:\"Page 14 \u00b7 triplets \u2014 R L R \u00b7 L R L\", img:TR_IMG, noteY:0.521, beats:[\n    {sub:3, notes:[{x:0.0862,h:\"R\"},{x:0.2241,h:\"L\"},{x:0.3621,h:\"R\"}]},\n    {sub:3, notes:[{x:0.5862,h:\"L\"},{x:0.7241,h:\"R\"},{x:0.8621,h:\"L\"}]},\n  ]},\n];\nconst SUBLABEL = {2:\"8ths\",3:\"triplet\",4:\"16ths\",6:\"sextuplet\"};\nconst C = { bg:\"#14110F\", panel:\"#1F1A17\", border:\"#2E2825\", text:\"#EDE6DD\", muted:\"#8A7E73\", R:\"#E8A33D\", L:\"#4FB0A5\" };\nconst LEVELS = [[\"Beginner\",60],[\"Developing\",76],[\"Intermediate\",92],[\"Advanced\",110],[\"Expert\",130]];\n\nconst flatten = (ex)=> ex.beats.flatMap((b,bi)=> b.notes.map((n,j)=>({x:n.x,h:n.h,sub:b.sub,beatStart:j===0,beatNo:bi})));\n\nexport default function RudimentPlayer(){\n  const [exIdx,setExIdx]=useState(0);\n  const [tempo,setTempo]=useState(76);\n  const [repeats,setRepeats]=useState(20);\n  const [playing,setPlaying]=useState(false);\n  const [cur,setCur]=useState(-1);\n  const [reps,setReps]=useState(0);\n\n  const ctxRef=useRef(null), schedRef=useRef(null), rafRef=useRef(null);\n  const nextT=useRef(0), idxRef=useRef(0), measRef=useRef(0), qRef=useRef([]);\n  const flatRef=useRef(flatten(EXERCISES[0])), tempoRef=useRef(76), repRef=useRef(20);\n  useEffect(()=>{tempoRef.current=tempo;},[tempo]);\n  useEffect(()=>{repRef.current=repeats;},[repeats]);\n\n  const ex = EXERCISES[exIdx];\n  const flat = flatten(ex);\n  const cn = cur>=0 ? flat[cur] : null;\n  const col = cn ? (cn.h===\"R\"?C.R:C.L) : C.muted;\n\n  const ensure=async()=>{ if(!ctxRef.current) ctxRef.current=new (window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)(); await ctxRef.current.resume(); };\n  const click=(t,accent)=>{const c=ctxRef.current,o=c.createOscillator(),g=c.createGain();o.frequency.value=accent?1500:850;g.gain.setValueAtTime(accent?0.5:0.2,t);g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,t+0.05);o.connect(g).connect(c.destination);o.start(t);o.stop(t+0.06);};\n\n  const scheduler=useCallback(()=>{\n    const c=ctxRef.current, F=flatRef.current;\n    while(nextT.current < c.currentTime + 0.12){\n      const note=F[idxRef.current];\n      click(nextT.current, note.beatStart);\n      qRef.current.push({time:nextT.current, idx:idxRef.current});\n      nextT.current += (1/note.sub)*(60/tempoRef.current);   // exact onset spacing\n      idxRef.current++;\n      if(idxRef.current>=F.length){\n        idxRef.current=0; measRef.current++;\n        if(measRef.current>=repRef.current){ finish(); return; }\n      }\n    }\n  },[]);\n  const draw=useCallback(()=>{\n    const c=ctxRef.current;\n    if(c) while(qRef.current.length && qRef.current[0].time<=c.currentTime){ const e=qRef.current.shift(); setCur(e.idx); setReps(measRef.current); }\n    rafRef.current=requestAnimationFrame(draw);\n  },[]);\n  const play=async()=>{ await ensure(); flatRef.current=flatten(EXERCISES[exIdx]); nextT.current=ctxRef.current.currentTime+0.06; setPlaying(true); schedRef.current=setInterval(scheduler,25); rafRef.current=requestAnimationFrame(draw); };\n  const pause=()=>{ setPlaying(false); clearInterval(schedRef.current); cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current); qRef.current=[]; };\n  const finish=()=>{ pause(); setCur(-1); idxRef.current=0; measRef.current=0; setReps(repeats); };\n  const reset=()=>{ pause(); idxRef.current=0; measRef.current=0; setCur(-1); setReps(0); };\n  const pick=(i)=>{ reset(); setExIdx(i); };\n  useEffect(()=>()=>pause(),[]);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen flex justify-center font-sans\" style={{background:C.bg,color:C.text}}>\n      <div className=\"w-full max-w-[640px] px-5 py-8\">\n        <div className=\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.3em] uppercase mb-3\" style={{color:C.muted}}>Stick Control \u00b7 Player</div>\n        <div className=\"flex gap-2 mb-5\">\n          {EXERCISES.map((e,i)=>(\n            <button key={e.id} onClick={()=>pick(i)} className=\"flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-lg border text-sm font-semibold transition\"\n              style={{borderColor: exIdx===i?C.R:C.border, background: exIdx===i?\"#241C12\":C.panel, color:C.text}}>\n              {i===0?\"16ths\":\"Triplets\"}\n            </button>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n        <h1 className=\"text-xl font-black tracking-tight mb-4\">{ex.name}</h1>\n\n        <div className=\"rounded-xl p-4 mb-5\" style={{background:\"#fff\"}}>\n          <div style={{position:\"relative\", width:\"100%\"}}>\n            <img src={ex.img} alt={ex.name} style={{width:\"100%\",display:\"block\"}} draggable={false}/>\n            {cn && (\n              <div style={{position:\"absolute\", left:(cn.x*100)+\"%\", top:(ex.noteY*100)+\"%\",\n                width:\"6%\", paddingBottom:\"6%\", transform:\"translate(-50%,-50%)\", borderRadius:\"50%\",\n                background:col, opacity:0.42, boxShadow:`0 0 0 2px ${col}`}}/>   /* snaps, no transition */\n            )}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center gap-6 mb-6\">\n          <div className=\"w-20 h-24 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-5xl font-black\" style={{background:cn?col:C.panel,color:cn?C.bg:C.muted,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`}}>{cn?cn.h:\"\u2013\"}</div>\n          <div className=\"text-center\">\n            <div className=\"font-mono text-3xl font-bold\">{Math.min(reps+(playing?1:0),repeats)}<span style={{color:C.muted}}> / {repeats}</span></div>\n            <div className=\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.2em] uppercase mt-1\" style={{color:C.muted}}>{cn?SUBLABEL[cn.sub]:\"repetitions\"}</div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"rounded-xl border p-4 mb-4\" style={{borderColor:C.border,background:C.panel}}>\n          <div className=\"flex justify-between mb-2 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider\" style={{color:C.muted}}><span>Tempo</span><span className=\"font-mono\" style={{color:C.text}}>{tempo} BPM</span></div>\n          <input type=\"range\" min={40} max={200} value={tempo} onChange={e=>setTempo(+e.target.value)} className=\"w-full\" style={{accentColor:C.R}}/>\n          <div className=\"flex gap-2 mt-3\">\n            {LEVELS.map(([n,t])=>(\n              <button key={n} onClick={()=>setTempo(t)} className=\"flex-1 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold transition\" style={{background:tempo===t?\"#241C12\":C.bg,border:`1px solid ${tempo===t?C.R:C.border}`,color:C.text}}>{n}<br/><span style={{color:C.muted}}>{t}</span></button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl border\" style={{borderColor:C.border,background:C.panel}}>\n            <span className=\"text-xs uppercase tracking-wider\" style={{color:C.muted}}>Repeat</span>\n            <input type=\"number\" min={1} value={repeats} onChange={e=>setRepeats(Math.max(1,+e.target.value))} className=\"w-12 bg-transparent outline-none font-mono text-center\" style={{color:C.text}}/><span className=\"text-xs\" style={{color:C.muted}}>\u00d7</span>\n          </div>\n          <button onClick={playing?pause:play} className=\"flex-1 py-3.5 rounded-xl font-black text-lg active:scale-[0.99] transition\" style={{background:C.R,color:C.bg}}>{playing?\"Pause\":(reps>0?\"Resume\":\"Play\")}</button>\n          <button onClick={reset} className=\"px-4 timeSig:\"\u00a2\", meter:\"cut time (2/2)\", noteValue:\"eighth-note triplets\",\n    measureBeats:2,\n    beats:[                                   // sub 3 = three per quarter (triplet)\n      {sub:3, notes:[{x:0.0862,h:\"R\"},{x:0.2241,h:\"L\"},{x:0.3621,h:\"R\"}]},\n      {sub:3, notes:[{x:0.5862,h:\"L\"},{x:0.7241,h:\"R\"},{x:0.8621,h:\"L\"}]},\n    ]},\n];\nconst SUBLABEL = {2:\"eighths\",3:\"triplet\",4:\"16ths\",6:\"sextuplet\"};\nconst C = { bg:\"#14110F\", panel:\"#1F1A17\", border:\"#2E2825\", text:\"#EDE6DD\", muted:\"#8A7E73\", R:\"#E8A33D\", L:\"#4FB0A5\" };\nconst LEVELS = [[\"Beginner\",60],[\"Developing\",76],[\"Intermediate\",92],[\"Advanced\",110],[\"Expert\",130]];\n\nconst flatten = (ex)=> ex.beats.flatMap((b,bi)=> b.notes.map((n,j)=>({\n  x:n.x, h:n.h, sub:b.sub, beatStart:j===0, measureStart:j===0 && bi%ex.measureBeats===0\n})));\n\nexport default function RudimentPlayer(){\n  const [exIdx,setExIdx]=useState(0);\n  const [tempo,setTempo]=useState(76);\n  const [repeats,setRepeats]=useState(20);\n  const [playing,setPlaying]=useState(false);\n  const [cur,setCur]=useState(-1);\n  const [reps,setReps]=useState(0);\n\n  const ctxRef=useRef(null), schedRef=useRef(null), rafRef=useRef(null);\n  const nextT=useRef(0), idxRef=useRef(0), measRef=useRef(0), qRef=useRef([]);\n  const flatRef=useRef(flatten(EXERCISES[0])), tempoRef=useRef(76), repRef=useRef(20);\n  useEffect(()=>{tempoRef.current=tempo;},[tempo]);\n  useEffect(()=>{repRef.current=repeats;},[repeats]);\n\n  const ex = EXERCISES[exIdx];\n  const flat = flatten(ex);\n  const cn = cur>=0 ? flat[cur] : null;\n  const col = cn ? (cn.h===\"R\"?C.R:C.L) : C.muted;\n\n  const ensure=async()=>{ if(!ctxRef.current) ctxRef.current=new (window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)(); await ctxRef.current.resume(); };\n  const click=(t,f,g)=>{const c=ctxRef.current,o=c.createOscillator(),gg=c.createGain();o.frequency.value=f;gg.gain.setValueAtTime(g,t);gg.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,t+0.05);o.connect(gg).connect(c.destination);o.start(t);o.stop(t+0.06);};\n  const voice=(t,note)=> note.measureStart?click(t,1700,0.55):note.beatStart?click(t,1100,0.4):click(t,800,0.18);\n\n  const scheduler=useCallback(()=>{\n    const c=ctxRef.current, F=flatRef.current;\n    while(nextT.current < c.currentTime + 0.12){\n      const note=F[idxRef.current];\n      voice(nextT.current, note);\n      qRef.current.push({time:nextT.current, idx:idxRef.current});\n      nextT.current += (1/note.sub)*(60/tempoRef.current);   // quarter \u00f7 subdivision = onset spacing\n      idxRef.current++;\n      if(idxRef.current>=F.length){ idxRef.current=0; measRef.current++; if(measRef.current>=repRef.current){ finish(); return; } }\n    }\n  },[]);\n  const draw=useCallback(()=>{\n    const c=ctxRef.current;\n    if(c) while(qRef.current.length && qRef.current[0].time<=c.currentTime){ const e=qRef.current.shift(); setCur(e.idx); setReps(measRef.current); }\n    rafRef.current=requestAnimationFrame(draw);\n  },[]);\n  const play=async()=>{ await ensure(); flatRef.current=flatten(EXERCISES[exIdx]); nextT.current=ctxRef.current.currentTime+0.06; setPlaying(true); schedRef.current=setInterval(scheduler,25); rafRef.current=requestAnimationFrame(draw); };\n  const pause=()=>{ setPlaying(false); clearInterval(schedRef.current); cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current); qRef.current=[]; };\n  const finish=()=>{ pause(); setCur(-1); idxRef.current=0; measRef.current=0; setReps(repeats); };\n  const reset=()=>{ pause(); idxRef.current=0; measRef.current=0; setCur(-1); setReps(0); };\n  const pick=(i)=>{ reset(); setExIdx(i); };\n  useEffect(()=>()=>pause(),[]);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen flex justify-center font-sans\" style={{background:C.bg,color:C.text}}>\n      <div className=\"w-full max-w-[640px] px-5 py-8\">\n        <div className=\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.3em] uppercase mb-3\" style={{color:C.muted}}>Stick Control \u00b7 Player</div>\n        <div className=\"flex gap-2 mb-5\">\n          {EXERCISES.map((e,i)=>(\n            <button key={e.id} onClick={()=>pick(i)} className=\"flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-lg border text-sm font-semibold transition\"\n              style={{borderColor: exIdx===i?C.R:C.border, background: exIdx===i?\"#241C12\":C.panel, color:C.text}}>\n              {i===0?\"Eighths (p.5)\":\"Triplets (p.14)\"}\n            </button>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex items-end justify-between mb-3\">\n          <h1 className=\"text-xl font-black tracking-tight\">{ex.name}</h1>\n          {/* meter + note value, read from the page */}\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm\" style={{color:C.muted}}>\n            <span className=\"text-2xl font-serif\" style={{color:C.text, lineHeight:1}}>{ex.timeSig}</span>\n            <span>{ex.meter} \u00b7 {ex.noteValue}</span>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"rounded-xl p-4 mb-5\" style={{background:\"#fff\"}}>\n          <div style={{position:\"relative\", width:\"100%\"}}>\n            <img src={ex.img} alt={ex.name} style={{width:\"100%\",display:\"block\"}} draggable={false}/>\n            {cn && (<div style={{position:\"absolute\", left:(cn.x*100)+\"%\", top:(ex.noteY*100)+\"%\", width:\"6%\", paddingBottom:\"6%\", transform:\"translate(-50%,-50%)\", borderRadius:\"50%\", background:col, opacity:0.42, boxShadow:`0 0 0 2px ${col}`}}/>)}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center gap-6 mb-6\">\n          <div className=\"w-20 h-24 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-5xl font-black\" style={{background:cn?col:C.panel,color:cn?C.bg:C.muted,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`}}>{cn?cn.h:\"\u2013\"}</div>\n          <div className=\"text-center\">\n            <div className=\"font-mono text-3xl font-bold\">{Math.min(reps+(playing?1:0),repeats)}<span style={{color:C.muted}}> / {repeats}</span></div>\n            <div className=\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.2em] uppercase mt-1\" style={{color:C.muted}}>{cn?SUBLABEL[cn.sub]:\"repetitions\"}</div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"rounded-xl border p-4 mb-4\" style={{borderColor:C.border,background:C.panel}}>\n          <div className=\"flex justify-between mb-2 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider\" style={{color:C.muted}}>\n            <span>Tempo (\u2669 = quarter)</span><span className=\"font-mono\" style={{color:C.text}}>\u2669 = {tempo}</span>\n          </div>\n          <input type=\"range\" min={40} max={200} value={tempo} onChange={e=>setTempo(+e.target.value)} className=\"w-full\" style={{accentColor:C.R}}/>\n          <div className=\"flex gap-2 mt-3\">\n            {LEVELS.map(([n,t])=>(\n              <button key={n} onClick={()=>setTempo(t)} className=\"flex-1 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold transition\" style={{background:tempo===t?\"#241C12\":C.bg,border:`1px solid ${tempo===t?C.R:C.border}`,color:C.text}}>{n}<br/><span style={{color:C.muted}}>{t}</span></button>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl border\" style={{borderColor:C.border,background:C.panel}}>\n            <span className=\"text-xs uppercase tracking-wider\" style={{color:C.muted}}>Repeat</span>\n            <input type=\"number\" min={1} value={repeats} onChange={e=>setRepeats(Math.max(1,+e.target.value))} className=\"w-12 bg-transparent outline-none font-mono text-center\" style={{color:C.text}}/><span className=\"text-xs\" style={{color:C.muted}}>\u00d7</span>\n          </div>\n          <button onClick={playing?pause:play} className=\"flex-1 py-3.5 rounded-xl font-black text-lg active:scale-[0.99] transition\" [exIdx,setExIdx]=useState(0);\n  const [tempo,setTempo]=useState(76);\n  const [repeats,setRepeats]=useState(20);\n  const [subClicks,setSubClicks]=useState(false);   // false = click 1-2-3-4 only\n  const [playing,setPlaying]=useState(false);\n  const [cur,setCur]=useState(-1);\n  const [reps,setReps]=useState(0);\n\n  const ctxRef=useRef(null),schedRef=useRef(null),rafRef=useRef(null);\n  const nextT=useRef(0),idxRef=useRef(0),measRef=useRef(0),qRef=useRef([]);\n  const flatRef=useRef(flatten(EXERCISES[0])),tempoRef=useRef(76),repRef=useRef(20),subRef=useRef(false);\n (window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)(); await ctxRef.current.resume(); };\n  const click=(t,f,g)=>{const enabled\n  };\n\n  const scheduler=useCallback(()=>{\n    const c=ctxRef.current,F=flatRef.current;\n    while(nextT.current < c.currentTime+0.12){\n      const note=F[idxRef.current];\n      voice(nextT.current,note);\n      qRef.current.push({time:nextT.current,idx:idxRef.current});\n      nextT.current += (1/note.sub)*(60/tempoRef.current);\n      idxRef.current++;\n      if(idxRef.current>=F.length){ idxRef.current=0; measRef.current++; if(measRef.current>=repRef.current){ finish(); return; } }\n    }\n  },[]);\n  const draw=useCallback(()=>{ const c=ctxRef.current; if(c) while(qRef.current.length&&qRef.current[0].time<=c.currentTime){const e=qRef.current.shift();setCur(e.idx);setReps(measRef.current);} rafRef.current=requestAnimationFrame(draw); },[]);\n  const play=async()=>{ await ensure(); flatRef.current=flatten(EXERCISES[exIdx]); nextT.current=ctxRef.current.currentTime+0.06; setPlaying(true); schedRef.current=setInterval(scheduler,25); rafRef.current=requestAnimationFrame(draw); };\n  const pause=()=>{ setPlaying(false); clearInterval(schedRef.current); cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current); qRef.current=[]; };\n  const finish=()=>{ pause(); setCur(-1); idxRef.current=0; measRef.current=0; setReps(repeats); };\n  const reset=()=>{ pause(); idxRef.current=0; measRef.current=0; setCur(-1); setReps(0); };\n  const pick=(i)=>{ reset(); setExIdx(i); };\n  useEffect(()=>()=>pause(),[]);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen flex justify-center font-sans\" style={{background:C.bg,color:C.text}}>\n      <div style={{borderColor:exIdx===i?C.R:C.border,background:exIdx===i?\"#241C12\":C.panel,color:C.text}}>\n              {[\"Eighths\",\"Triplets\",\"Complex\"][i]}\n            </button>\n          ))}\n </div>\n\n        <div className=\"rounded-xl p-4 mb-5\" style={{background:\"#fff\"}}>\n          <div style={{position:\"relative\",width:\"100%\"}}>\n            <img src={ex.img} alt={ex.name} className=\"font-mono text-3xl font-bold\">{Math.min(reps+(playing?1:0),repeats)}<span style={{color:C.muted}}> / {repeats}</span></div><div className=\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.2em] uppercase mt-1\" style={{color:C.muted}}>{cn?SUBLABEL[cn.sub]:\"repetitions\"}</div></div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"rounded-xl border p-4 mb-4\" style={{borderColor:C.border,background:C.panel}}>\n const [tempo,setTempo]=useState(76);\n  const [repeats,setRepeats]=useState(20);\n  const [subClicks,setSubClicks]=useState(false);\n  const [playing,setPlaying]=useState(false);\n  const [cur,setCur]=useState(-1);\n  const [reps,setReps]=useState(0);\n  const ctxRef=useRef(null),schedRef=useRef(null),rafRef=useRef(null);\n  const nextT=useRef(0),idxRef=useRef(0),measRef=useRef(0),qRef=useRef([]);\n  const flatRef=useRef(flatten(EXERCISES[0])),tempoRef=useRef(76),repRef=useRef(20),subRef=useRef(false);\n ctxRef.current=new (window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)(); await ctxRef.current.resume(); };\n  const click=(t,f,g)=>{const c=ctxRef.current,o=c.createOscillator(),gg=c.createGain();o.frequency.value=f;gg.gain.setValueAtTime(g,t);gg.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,t+0.05);o.connect(gg).connect(c.destination);o.start(t);o.stop(t+0.06);};\n scheduler=useCallback(()=>{\n    const c=ctxRef.current,Fl=flatRef.current;\n    while(nextT.current < c.currentTime+0.12){\n      const note=Fl[idxRef.current];\n      voice(nextT.current,note);\n      qRef.current.push({time:nextT.current,idx:idxRef.current});\n      nextT.current += (1/note.sub)*(60/tempoRef.current);\n      idxRef.current++;\n      if(idxRef.current>=Fl.length){ idxRef.current=0; measRef.current++; if(measRef.current>=repRef.current){ finish(); return; } }\n    }\n  },[]);\n  const draw=useCallback(()=>{ const c=ctxRef.current; if(c) while(qRef.current.length&&qRef.current[0].time<=c.currentTime){const e=qRef.current.shift();setCur(e.idx);setReps(measRef.current);} rafRef.current=requestAnimationFrame(draw); },[]);\n  const rafRef.current=requestAnimationFrame(draw); };\n  const pause=()=>{ setPlaying(false); clearInterval(schedRef.current); cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current); qRef.current=[]; };\n  const finish=()=>{ pause(); setCur(-1); idxRef.current=0; measRef.current=0; setReps(repeats); };\n  const reset=()=>{ pause(); idxRef.current=0; measRef.current=0; setCur(-1); setReps(0); };\n  const pick=(i)=>{ reset(); setExIdx(i); };\n  useEffect(()=>()=>pause(),[]);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen flex justify-center font-sans\" style={{background:C.bg,color:C.text}}>\n      <div {{sub:3,notes:[{{x:{F[18]},h:\\\"L\\\"}},{{x:{F[19]},h:\\\"R\\\"}},{{x:{F[20]},h:\\\"L\\\"}}]}},\\n    ]'''\\n\\ntpl = r'''import React, { useState, useRef, useEffect, useCallback } from \\\"react\\\";\\nconst P5_IMG=\\\"data:image/png;base64,__P5__\\\";\\nconst TR_IMG=\\\"data:image/png;base64,__TR__\\\";\\nconst FL_IMG=\\\"data:image/png;base64,__FL__\\\";\\n\\nconst EXERCISES=[\\n  { id:\\\"p5\\\", name:\\\"Page 5 \\u00b7 Ex 1\\\", img:P5_IMG, noteY:0.388, timeSig:\\\"\\\\u00A2\\\", meter:\\\"cut time (2/2)\\\", noteValue:\\\"eighth notes\\\", measureBeats:4,\\n    beats:[\\n      {sub:2,notes:[{x:0.2154,h:\\\"R\\\"},{x:0.2602,h:\\\"L\\\"}]},{sub:2,notes:[{x:0.3089,h:\\\"R\\\"},{x:0.3537,h:\\\"L\\\"}]},\\n {sub:3,notes:[{x:0.0862,h:\\\"R\\\"},{x:0.2241,h:\\\"L\\\"},{x:0.3621,h:\\\"R\\\"}]}, {sub:3,notes:[{x:0.5862,h:\\\"L\\\"},{x:0.7241,h:\\\"R\\\"},{x:0.8621,h:\\\"L\\\"}]} ]},\\n  { id:\\\"fl\\\", name:\\\"Page 14 \\u00b7 Ex 3 (full line)\\\", img:FL_IMG, noteY:0.541, timeSig:\\\"\\\\u00A2\\\", meter:\\\"cut time (2/2)\\\", noteValue:\\\"16ths \\\\u00B7 8ths \\\\u00B7 triplets\\\", measureBeats:4,\\n    beats:__FLBEATS__ },\\n];\\nconst SUBLABEL={1:\\\"rest\\\",2:\\\"eighths\\\",3:\\\"triplet\\\",4:\\\"16ths\\\",6:\\\"sextuplet\\\"};\\nconst C={bg:\\\"#14110F\\\",panel:\\\"#1F1A17\\\",border:\\\"#2E2825\\\",text:\\\"#EDE6DD\\\",muted:\\\"#8A7E73\\\",R:\\\"#E8A33D\\\",L:\\\"#4FB0A5\\\"};\\nconst LEVELS=[[\\\"Beginner\\\",60],[\\\"Developing\\\",76],[\\\"Intermediate\\\",92],[\\\"Advanced\\\",110],[\\\"Expert\\\",130]];\\nconst flatten=(ex)=>ex.beats.flatMap((b,bi)=>b.notes.map((n,j)=>({\\n  x:n.rest?null:n.x, h:n.rest?null:n.h, rest:!!n.rest, sub:b.sub, beatStart:j===0, measureStart:j===0&&bi%ex.measureBeats===0\\n})));\\n\\nexport default function RudimentPlayer(){\\n  const [exIdx,setExIdx]=useState(0);\\n  const [tempo,setTempo]=useState(76);\\n  const [repeats,setRepeats]=useState(20);\\n  const [subClicks,setSubClicks]=useState(false);\\n  const [playing,setPlaying]=useState(false);\\n  const [cur,setCur]=useState(-1);\\n  const [reps,setReps]=useState(0);\\n  const ctxRef=useRef(null),schedRef=useRef(null),rafRef=useRef(null);\\n  const nextT=useRef(0),idxRef=useRef(0),measRef=useRef(0),qRef=useRef([]);\\n  const flatRef=useRef(flatten(EXERCISES[0])),tempoRef=useRef(76),repRef=useRef(20),subRef=useRef(false);\\n  useEffect(()=>{tempoRef.current=tempo;},[tempo]);\\n  useEffect(()=>{repRef.current=repeats;},[repeats]);\\n  useEffect(()=>{subRef.current=subClicks;},[subClicks]);\\n\\n  const ex=EXERCISES[exIdx]; const flat=flatten(ex);\\n  const cn=cur>=0?flat[cur]:null; const showNote=cn&&!cn.rest; const col=showNote?(cn.h===\\\"R\\\"?C.R:C.L):C.muted;\\n\\n  const ensure=async()=>{ if(!ctxRef.current) ctxRef.current=new (window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)(); await ctxRef.current.resume(); };\\n  const click=(t,f,g)=>{const c=ctxRef.current,o=c.createOscillator(),gg=c.createGain();o.frequency.value=f;gg.gain.setValueAtTime(g,t);gg.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,t+0.05);o.connect(gg).connect(c.destination);o.start(t);o.stop(t+0.06);};\\n  const voice=(t,note)=>{ if(note.measureStart) click(t,1700,0.55); else if(note.beatStart) click(t,1100,0.4); else if(subRef.current&&!note.rest) click(t,800,0.15); };\\n\\n  const scheduler=useCallback(()=>{\\n    const c=ctxRef.current,Fl=flatRef.current;\\n    while(nextT.current < c.currentTime+0.12){\\n      const note=Fl[idxRef.current];\\n      voice(nextT.current,note);\\n      qRef.current.push({time:nextT.current,idx:idxRef.current});\\n      nextT.current += (1/note.sub)*(60/tempoRef.current);\\n      idxRef.current++;\\n      if(idxRef.current>=Fl.length){ idxRef.current=0; measRef.current++; if(measRef.current>=repRef.current){ finish(); return; } }\\n    }\\n  },[]);\\n  const draw=useCallback(()=>{ const c=ctxRef.current; if(c) while(qRef.current.length&&qRef.current[0].time<=c.currentTime){const e=qRef.current.shift();setCur(e.idx);setReps(measRef.current);} rafRef.current=requestAnimationFrame(draw); },[]);\\n  const play=async()=>{ await ensure(); flatRef.current=flatten(EXERCISES[exIdx]); nextT.current=ctxRef.current.currentTime+0.06; setPlaying(true); schedRef.current=setInterval(scheduler,25); rafRef.current=requestAnimationFrame(draw); };\\n  const pause=()=>{ setPlaying(false); clearInterval(schedRef.current); cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current); qRef.current=[]; };\\n  const finish=()=>{ pause(); setCur(-1); idxRef.current=0; measRef.current=0; setReps(repeats); };\\n  const reset=()=>{ pause(); idxRef.current=0; measRef.current=0; setCur(-1); setReps(0); };\\n  const pick=(i)=>{ reset(); setExIdx(i); };\\n  useEffect(()=>()=>pause(),[]);\\n\\n  return (\\n    <div className=\\\"min-h-screen flex justify-center font-sans\\\" style={{background:C.bg,color:C.text}}>\\n      <div className=\\\"w-full max-w-[760px] px-5 py-8\\\">\\n        <div className=\\\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.3em] uppercase mb-3\\\" style={{color:C.muted}}>Stick Control \\\\u00B7 Player</div>\\n        <div className=\\\"flex gap-2 mb-5\\\">\\n          {EXERCISES.map((e,i)=>(<button key={e.id} onClick={()=>pick(i)} className=\\\"flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-lg border text-xs font-semibold transition\\\" style={{borderColor:exIdx===i?C.R:C.border,background:exIdx===i?\\\"#241C12\\\":C.panel,color:C.text}}>{[\\\"Eighths\\\",\\\"Triplets\\\",\\\"Full line\\\"][i]}</button>))}\\n        </div>\\n        <div className=\\\"flex items-end justify-between mb-3\\\">\\n          <h1 className=\\\"text-xl font-black tracking-tight\\\">{ex.name}</h1>\\n          <div className=\\\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm\\\" style={{color:C.muted}}><span className=\\\"text-2xl\\\" style={{color:C.text,lineHeight:1}}>{ex.timeSig}</span><span>{ex.meter} \\\\u00B7 {ex.noteValue}</span></div>\\n        </div>\\n        <div className=\\\"rounded-xl p-4 mb-5\\\" style={{background:\\\"#fff\\\"}}>\\n          <div style={{position:\\\"relative\\\",width:\\\"100%\\\"}}>\\n            <img src={ex.img} alt={ex.name} style={{width:\\\"100%\\\",display:\\\"block\\\"}} draggable={false}/>\\n            {showNote&&(<div style={{position:\\\"absolute\\\",left:(cn.x*100)+\\\"%\\\",top:(ex.noteY*100)+\\\"%\\\",width:\\\"4.5%\\\",paddingBottom:\\\"4.5%\\\",transform:\\\"translate(-50%,-50%)\\\",borderRadius:\\\"50%\\\",background:col,opacity:0.42,boxShadow:`0 0 0 2px ${col}`}}/>)}\\n          </div>\\n        </div>\\n        <div className=\\\"flex items-center justify-center gap-6 mb-6\\\">\\n          <div className=\\\"w-20 h-24 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-5xl font-black\\\" style={{background:showNote?col:C.panel,color:showNote?C.bg:C.muted,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`}}>{showNote?cn.h:\\\"\\\\u2013\\\"}</div>\\n          <div className=\\\"text-center\\\"><div className=\\\"font-mono text-3xl font-bold\\\">{Math.min(reps+(playing?1:0),repeats)}<span style={{color:C.muted}}> / {repeats}</span></div><div className=\\\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.2em] uppercase mt-1\\\" style={{color:C.muted}}>{cn?(cn.rest?\\\"rest\\\":SUBLABEL[cn.sub]):\\\"repetitions\\\"}</div></div>\\n        </div>\\n        <div I'm considering whether to use uniform evenly-spaced positions across all exercises or crop individual exercise images for more accurate positioning.\n\nThe challenge is that the player displays the actual notation image, so handling 24 cropped images in the browser gets complicated. I'm leaning toward simplifying the admin panel to focus on what's reliable: upload, vision extraction to JSON with exercise number, sticking, meter, and note value, then an editable review grid before exporting the final JSON.\n\nThe production server would handle the precise cropping, detection, and deskewing separately to attach real images and exact positions\u2014that's the robust approach I've already validated in Python. So the artifact becomes cleaner: load the page image, call vision to extract structured exercise data with sticking patterns, render an editable grid where each exercise card shows the number, meter, note value, and clickable sticking buttons for review and adjustment.\n\nI'm going to focus this turn on three things: showing the segmentation proof to the user, building out the admin panel artifact as the main deliverable, and updating the player layout. Building the admin panel now...\n\nI'm setting max_tokens to 1000 as specified, though I'm aware that 24 exercises with sticking patterns might push close to that limit. I'll keep the JSON compact by representing stickings as strings like \"RLRLRLRLRLRLRLRL\" to stay within budget. After parsing the API response into the exercises array, I'll display an editable grid of cards where each exercise can be reviewed and modified, then add an export button to download the final JSON for the player. I'll also include sample fallback data from the page image so the tool works even if the API call fails. I'm seeing a lot of pattern data here that I could manually enter, but that's tedious. I'll keep the fallback sample minimal with just the first few examples and rely on the API to pull the full dataset, making the grid editable for adjustments. Given the scope constraints, I should focus on building a functional admin panel without over-engineering it, and reconsider whether both the admin and player artifacts are necessary or if I should prioritize the player layout changes instead.\n\nI'll go with the admin panel as the main artifact since that's the bigger build. I'm setting up the PageImporter component to handle image uploads via FileReader, extract the base64 data, and call the Anthropic API to parse the patterns from the image, then display them in an editable grid for review and export.\n\nWriting the PageImporter component... Building the UI with exercise cards that display sticking as toggleable cells (R in amber, L in teal), plus a text field to edit the sticking directly. For export, I'm grouping the sticking into beats\u2014pairing notes for eighth notes to create 8 beats in 2/2 time\u2014then outputting the player-format JSON with timeSignature, noteValue, and evenly-spaced positions, displayed in a textarea with a copy button since blob downloads don't work in the artifact sandbox. For the admin panel, I'll export the sticking and meter data that the vision extraction handles well, then use evenly-spaced template positions for the highlight overlay since in-browser image segmentation is unreliable\u2014the production version will have the server crop each exercise and detect real positions, but for this demo the player can still work with the template layout.\n\nNow I'm going to build the PageImporter component to handle the actual file upload and exercise extraction.",

      "file_text": "import React, { useState, useRef } from \"react\";\n\n/**\n * Admin: load a page photo -> the app separates the exercises and reads each one.\n * For \"Single Beat Combinations\" style pages every exercise shares one rhythm\n * (cut-time eighth notes, 16 per line); only the STICKING differs, so extraction\n * = read meter + note value once, then the R/L sequence per exercise.\n * Precise deskew/crop/notehead-detection runs server-side; this panel reads the\n * structure, lets you correct it, and exports player-ready JSON.\n */\n\nconst C = { bg:\"#14110F\", panel:\"#1F1A17\", panel2:\"#241C12\", border:\"#2E2825\",\n  text:\"#EDE6DD\", muted:\"#8A7E73\", R:\"#E8A33D\", L:\"#4FB0A5\", ok:\"#6FbF73\" };\n\nconst SAMPLE = { // shown if no live extraction yet \u2014 real stickings from this page\n  timeSignature:\"2/2\", noteValue:\"eighth\",\n  exercises:[\n    {n:1, sticking:\"RLRLRLRLRLRLRLRL\"},\n    {n:2, sticking:\"LRLRLRLRLRLRLRLR\"},\n    {n:3, sticking:\"RRLLRRLLRRLLRRLL\"},\n    {n:4, sticking:\"LLRRLLRRLLRRLLRR\"},\n  ]\n};\n\nconst groupBeats = (s) => {            // 16 eighths -> 8 quarter-beats of 2\n  const h=s.toUpperCase().replace(/[^RL]/g,\"\").split(\"\");\n  const beats=[];\n  for(let i=0;i<h.length;i+=2) beats.push({sub:2, hands:[h[i], h[i+1]].filter(Boolean)});\n  return beats;\n};\nconst xPositions = (n) => Array.from({length:n},(_,i)=> +( (i+0.5)/n ).toFixed(4) );\n\nexport default function PageImporter(){\n  const [img,setImg]=useState(null);          // {dataUrl, b64, media}\n  const [meta,setMeta]=useState({timeSignature:\"2/2\", noteValue:\"eighth\"});\n  const [exs,setExs]=useState([]);            // [{n,sticking}]\n  const [busy,setBusy]=useState(false);\n  const [err,setErr]=useState(\"\");\n  const [out,setOut]=useState(\"\");\n  const fileRef=useRef(null);\n\n  const onFile=(f)=>{\n    if(!f) return;\n    const r=new FileReader();\n    r.onload=()=>{ const d=r.result; setImg({dataUrl:d, b64:d.split(\",\")[1], media:f.type||\"image/png\"}); setExs([]); setOut(\"\"); setErr(\"\"); };\n    r.readAsDataURL(f);\n  };\n\n  const extract=async()=>{\n    if(!img) return;\n    setBusy(true); setErr(\"\");\n    const prompt=`You are reading a page from a snare-drum rudiment book. It has multiple NUMBERED exercises, each one line of music with a sticking (letters R and L) printed underneath.\nRead the time signature once (the \u00a2 symbol = cut time \"2/2\"; a plain C = \"4/4\") and the note value from the beams (one beam = \"eighth\", two beams = \"sixteenth\").\nReturn ONLY this JSON, no prose, no markdown:\n{\"timeSignature\":\"2/2\",\"noteValue\":\"eighth\",\"exercises\":[{\"n\":1,\"sticking\":\"RLRLRLRLRLRLRLRL\"}]}\n\"sticking\" is one letter per note, in order, uppercase R/L only. Include every numbered exercise on the page.`;\n    try{\n      const res=await fetch(\"https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages\",{\n        method:\"POST\", headers:{\"Content-Type\":\"application/json\"},\n        body:JSON.stringify({ model:\"claude-sonnet-4-6\", max_tokens:1000,\n          messages:[{role:\"user\", content:[\n            {type:\"image\", source:{type:\"base64\", media_type:img.media, data:img.b64}},\n            {type:\"text\", text:prompt}\n          ]}]\n        })\n      });\n      const data=await res.json();\n      const txt=(data.content||[]).filter(b=>b.type===\"text\").map(b=>b.text).join(\"\").replace(/```json|```/g,\"\").trim();\n      const j=JSON.parse(txt);\n      setMeta({timeSignature:j.timeSignature||\"2/2\", noteValue:j.noteValue||\"eighth\"});\n      setExs((j.exercises||[]).map(e=>({n:e.n, sticking:(e.sticking||\"\").toUpperCase().replace(/[^RL]/g,\"\")})));\n    }catch(e){\n      setErr(\"Couldn't auto-read this page here (extraction runs server-side in the app). Loaded a sample so you can see the review flow.\");\n      setMeta({timeSignature:SAMPLE.timeSignature, noteValue:SAMPLE.noteValue});\n      setExs(SAMPLE.exercises.map(e=>({...e})));\n    }finally{ setBusy(false); }\n  };\n\n  const toggle=(ei,ci)=> setExs(p=>p.map((e,i)=> i!==ei?e:{...e, sticking:e.sticking.split(\"\").map((c,k)=>k!==ci?c:(c===\"R\"?\"L\":\"R\")).join(\"\")}));\n  const setStr=(ei,v)=> setExs(p=>p.map((e,i)=> i!==ei?e:{...e, sticking:v.toUpperCase().replace(/[^RL]/g,\"\")}));\n\n  const buildExport=()=>{\n    const data=exs.filter(e=>e.sticking.length).map(e=>{\n      const beats=groupBeats(e.sticking);\n      const xs=xPositions(e.sticking.length);\n      let k=0; const beatsWithX=beats.map(b=>({sub:b.sub, notes:b.hands.map(h=>({x:xs[k++], h}))}));\n      return { id:`p_${e.n}`, name:`Ex ${e.n}`, source:\"imported page\",\n        timeSignature:meta.timeSignature, noteValue:meta.noteValue, measureBeats:4,\n        repeatCount:20, beats:beatsWithX };\n    });\n    setOut(JSON.stringify(data,null,2));\n  };\n\n  const Cell=({c,on,onClick})=>(\n    <button onClick={onClick} style={{width:26,height:30,borderRadius:6,fontWeight:800,fontSize:13,\n      border:`1px solid ${C.border}`, color:C.bg, background:c===\"R\"?C.R:C.L}}>{c}</button>\n  );\n\n  return (\n    <div style={{minHeight:\"100vh\",background:C.bg,color:C.text,fontFamily:\"ui-sans-serif,system-ui\"}}>\n      <div style={{maxWidth:920,margin:\"0 auto\",padding:\"24px 20px\"}}>\n        <div style={{fontSize:11,letterSpacing:\"0.3em\",textTransform:\"uppercase\",color:C.muted,marginBottom:6}}>Exercise Studio</div>\n        <h1 style={{fontSize:24,fontWeight:900,margin:\"0 0 4px\"}}>Page Importer</h1>\n        <p style={{color:C.muted,fontSize:14,margin:\"0 0 18px\"}}>Load a page photo \u2014 it separates the exercises and reads each sticking. Review, then export.</p>\n\n        {/* upload */}\n        <div onClick={()=>fileRef.current?.click()}\n          onDragOver={e=>e.preventDefault()} onDrop={e=>{e.preventDefault(); onFile(e.dataTransfer.files[0]);}}\n          style={{border:`1.5px dashed ${C.border}`,borderRadius:14,padding:img?10:34,textAlign:\"center\",cursor:\"pointer\",background:C.panel,marginBottom:14}}>\n          {img\n            ? <img src={img.dataUrl} alt=\"page\" style={{maxWidth:\"100%\",maxHeight:280,borderRadius:8,display:\"block\",margin:\"0 auto\"}}/>\n            : <div style={{color:C.muted}}><div style={{fontSize:15,fontWeight:700,color:C.text}}>Drop a page image, or click to choose</div><div style={{fontSize:13,marginTop:4}}>A full page of numbered exercises works \u2014 it will split them.</div></div>}\n          <input ref={fileRef} type=\"file\" accept=\"image/*\" hidden onChange={e=>onFile(e.target.files[0])}/>\n        </div>\n\n        <div style={{display:\"flex\",gap:10,marginBottom:16,flexWrap:\"wrap\"}}>\n          <button disabled={!img||busy} onClick={extract}\n            style={{padding:\"12px 18px\",borderRadius:12,fontWeight:800,border:\"none\",cursor:img?\"pointer\":\"default\",\n              background:img?C.R:C.panel,color:img?C.bg:C.muted,opacity:busy?0.6:1}}>\n            {busy?\"Reading page\u2026\":\"Separate & read exercises\"}</button>\n          {exs.length>0 && <button onClick={buildExport}\n            style={{padding:\"12px 18px\",borderRadius:12,fontWeight:800,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,background:C.panel,color:C.text,cursor:\"pointer\"}}>\n            Export player JSON ({exs.length})</button>}\n        </div>\n\n        {err && <div style={{background:C.panel,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:10,padding:\"10px 12px\",color:C.muted,fontSize:13,marginBottom:14}}>{err}</div>}\n\n        {exs.length>0 && (\n          <div style={{marginBottom:18}}>\n            <div style={{display:\"flex\",gap:14,alignItems:\"center\",fontSize:13,color:C.muted,marginBottom:10}}>\n              <span>Read from page:</span>\n              <span style={{color:C.text}}>\u00a2 {meta.timeSignature}</span>\n              <span style={{color:C.text}}>{meta.noteValue} notes</span>\n              <span style={{marginLeft:\"auto\"}}>Tap any cell to flip R\u2194L</span>\n            </div>\n            <div style={{display:\"grid\",gridTemplateColumns:\"repeat(auto-fill,minmax(420px,1fr))\",gap:10}}>\n              {exs.map((e,ei)=>(\n                <div key={ei} style={{background:C.panel,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:\"10px 12px\"}}>\n                  <div style={{display:\"flex\",alignItems:\"center\",gap:10,marginBottom:8}}>\n                    <span style={{fontWeight:900,fontVariantNumeric:\"tabular-nums\"}}>#{e.n}</span>\n                    <input value={e.sticking} onChange={ev=>setStr(ei,ev.target.value)}\n                      style={{flex:1,background:C.bg,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:8,color:C.text,padding:\"5px 8px\",fontFamily:\"ui-monospace,monospace\",fontSize:12}}/>\n                    <span style={{fontSize:12,color:e.sticking.length===16?C.ok:C.R}}>{e.sticking.length}/16</span>\n                  </div>\n                  <div style={{display:\"flex\",gap:3,flexWrap:\"wrap\"}}>\n                    {e.sticking.split(\"\").map((c,ci)=>(\n                      <Cell key={ci} c={c} onClick={()=>toggle(ei,ci)}/>\n                    ))}\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              ))}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n\n        {out && (\n          <div>\n            <div style={{fontSize:12,color:C.muted,marginBottom:6}}>Player-ready JSON \u2014 copy into the app / store:</div>\n            <textarea readOnly value={out} onFocus={e=>e.target.select()}\n              style={{width:\"100%\",height:240,background:C.panel,color:C.text,border:`1px solid ${C.border}`,borderRadius:10,padding:12,fontFamily:\"ui-monospace,monospace\",fontSize:11}}/>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n"

Loaded a sample so you can see the review flow.\\\");\\n      setMeta({timeSignature:SAMPLE.timeSignature, noteValue:SAMPLE.noteValue});\\n      setExs(SAMPLE.exercises.map(e=>({...e})));\\n    }finally{ setBusy(false); }\\n  };\\n\\n  const toggle=(ei,ci)=> setExs(p=>p.map((e,i)=> i!==ei?e:{...e, sticking:e.sticking.split(\\\"\\\").map((c,k)=>k!==ci?c:(c===\\\"R\\\"?\\\"L\\\":\\\"R\\\")).join(\\\"\\\")}));\\n  const setStr=(ei,v)=> setExs(p=>p.map((e,i)=> i!==ei?e:{...e, sticking:v.toUpperCase().replace(/[^RL]/g,\\\"\\\")}));\\n\\n  const buildExport=()=>{\\n    const data=exs.filter(e=>e.sticking.length).map(e=>{\\n      const beats=groupBeats(e.sticking);\\n      const xs=xPositions(e.sticking.length);\\n      let k=0; const beatsWithX=beats.map(b=>({sub:b.sub, notes:b.hands.map(h=>({x:xs[k++], h}))}));\\n      return { id:`p_${e.n}`, name:`Ex ${e.n}`, source:\\\"imported page\\\",\\n        timeSignature:meta.timeSignature, noteValue:meta.noteValue, measureBeats:4,\\n        repeatCount:20, beats:beatsWithX };\\n    });\\n    setOut(JSON.stringify(data,null,2));\\n  };\\n\\n  const Cell=({c,on,onClick})=>(\\n    <button onClick={onClick} style={{width:26,height:30,borderRadius:6,fontWeight:800,fontSize:13,\\n      border:`1px solid ${C.border}`, color:C.bg, background:c===\\\"R\\\"?C.R:C.L}}>{c}</button>\\n  );\\n\\n  return (\\n    <div style={{minHeight:\\\"100vh\\\",background:C.bg,color:C.text,fontFamily:\\\"ui-sans-serif,system-ui\\\"}}>\\n      <div style={{maxWidth:920,margin:\\\"0 auto\\\",padding:\\\"24px 20px\\\"}}>\\n        <div style={{fontSize:11,letterSpacing:\\\"0.3em\\\",textTransform:\\\"uppercase\\\",color:C.muted,marginBottom:6}}>Exercise Studio</div>\\n        <h1 style={{fontSize:24,fontWeight:900,margin:\\\"0 0 4px\\\"}}>Page Importer</h1>\\n        <p style={{color:C.muted,fontSize:14,margin:\\\"0 0 18px\\\"}}>Load a page photo \\u2014 it separates the exercises and reads each sticking. });\n}\n\nfunction Notation({ex,cn,showNote,col}){\n  const b=ex.box||FULLBOX; const full=b.w>=1&&b.h>=1;\n  const inner = full\n    ? <img src={ex.img} alt={ex.name} {position:\"relative\",width:\"100%\",overflow:\"hidden\",aspectRatio:`${(b.w*(ex.pageW||1))/(b.h*(ex.pageH||1))}`};\n  return (\n    <div style={wrapStyle}>\n      {inner}\n      {showNote&&<div    nextT.current+=(1/nt.sub)*(60/tempoRef.current); idxRef.current++;\n      if(idxRef.current>=Fl.length){ idxRef.current=0; measRef.current++; if(measRef.current>=repRef.current){ finish(); return; } } } },[]);\n  const draw=useCallback(()=>{ const c=ctxRef.current; if(c) while(qRef.current.length&&qRef.current[0].time<=c.currentTime){const nextT.current=ctxRef.current.currentTime+0.06; setPlaying(true); schedRef.current=setInterval(scheduler,25); rafRef.current=requestAnimationFrame(draw); };\n  const pause=()=>{ setPlaying(false); clearInterval(schedRef.current); cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current); qRef.current=[]; credit(); };\n  const finish=()=>{ pause(); setCur(-1); idxRef.current=0; measRef.current=0; accRef.current=0; extract=async()=>{ if(!page)return; setBusy(true); setNote(\"\");\n    const prompt=`Read this snare-drum rudiment page. It has numbered exercises, each one line of music with a sticking (R/L letters) printed underneath. Read the time signature once (\u00a2 = \"2/2\", C = \"4/4\") and note value from beams (one beam=\"eighth\", two=\"sixteenth\"). Return ONLY JSON: {\"timeSignature\":\"2/2\",\"noteValue\":\"eighth\",\"exercises\":[{\"n\":1,\"sticking\":\"RLRLRLRLRLRLRLRL\"}]} . sticking = one uppercase R/L per note in order; include every exercise.`;\n    try{ const res=await fetch(\"https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages\",{method:\"POST\",headers:{\"Content-Type\":\"application/json\"},\n      body:JSON.stringify({model:\"claude-sonnet-4-6\",max_tokens:1000,messages:[{role:\"user\",content:[{type:\"image\",source:{type:\"base64\",media_type:page.media,data:page.b64}},{type:\"text\",text:prompt}]}]})});\n      const data=await res.json(); const txt=(data.content||[]).filter(b=>b.type===\"text\").map(b=>b.text).join(\"\").replace(/```json|```/g,\"\").trim();\n      const j=JSON.parse(txt); const imps=buildImports(j,(j.exercises||[]).map(e=>({n:e.n,sticking:(e.sticking||\"\")})),page);\n      setLibrary(l=>[...l,...imps]); if(imps[0]){pick(imps[0].id);} setShowImport(false);\n    }catch(e){ setNote(\"Couldn't auto-read here (runs server-side in the app). Added 4 sample exercises so you can see the flow.\");\n      const sample={timeSignature:\"2/2\",noteValue:\"eighth\"}; const list=[{n:1,sticking:\"RLRLRLRLRLRLRLRL\"},{n:2,sticking:\"LRLRLRLRLRLRLRLR\"},{n:3,sticking:\"RRLLRRLLRRLLRRLL\"},{n:4,sticking:\"LLRRLLRRLLRRLLRR\"}];\n      const imps=buildImports(sample,list,page); setLibrary(l=>[...l,...imps]); if(imps[0])pick(imps[0].id); }\n    finally{ setBusy(false); }\n  };\n\n  const Btn=({on,children,...p})=>(<button {...p} className=\"flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold transition\" style={{background:on?C.panel2:C.panel,color:on?C.R:C.muted,border:`1px solid ${on?C.R:C.border}`}}>{children}</button>);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen flex justify-center font-sans\" style={{background:C.bg,color:C.text,alignItems:\"flex-start\"}}>\n      <div className=\"w-full max-w-[760px] px-5 py-5\">\n        <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-3\">\n          <div className=\"text-[11px] tracking-[0.3em] uppercase\" style={{color:C.muted}}>Stick Control \\u00B7 Studio</div>\n          <div className=\"text-xs\" style={{color:C.muted}}>Practiced <span className=\"font-mono\" style={{color:C.text}}>{fmt(totalSec)}</span></div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* exercise picker + import */}\n        <div className=\"flex gap-2 mb-3\">\n          <select value={selId} onChange={e=>pick(e.target.value)} className=\"flex-1 rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5 text-sm
